blockingIssues.description: Milestone validators are still not green: `npm test` fails on the pre-existing machine-specific absolute-path assertion in `test/conversation-output-cleaning.test.ts`, and `npm run lint` fails on unrelated repo-wide lint errors outside the demo-workspaces feature scope.
